/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libddgng.so -o libddgng.so CMakeFiles/ddgng.dir/core/gng.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ddgng.dir/core/projection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ddgng.dir/core/rnd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ddgng.dir/core/malloc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ddgng.dir/core/ddgng_wrapper.cpp.o  /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libglut.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libXmu.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libXi.so
